title: NEO AUTO-MODE per-run autonomy record (NEO_AUTOMODE_DESIGN_v1 rev5 sec 3A)
_home: <RunRoot>/autonomy_mode.json (MANAGER-written at run setup BEFORE Invoke-NeoRunPrepare; the ENGINE only READS it, through the single accessor Get-NeoRunAutonomyMode in orch_run.ps1)
_status: INSTALLED slice-1d 2026-07-08 (spec sha8 4F549F3A; ADDITIVE schema-add recorded with the v7 stop-and-wait ledger). Fail-closed two-lane routing: record ABSENT => interactive (gate_ref segment NONE); record PRESENT but ANY chain link invalid (unparseable / schema-invalid / run_id mismatch / autonomy_mode not case-exact 'auto' / attestation refusal / hash mismatch / envelope breach) => PARK + NOTIFY at prepare, no START package in EITHER mode. Unknown is NEVER coerced to auto.

run_id.description: Must match the persisted run manifest's run_id case-exact; a mismatch parks the run at prepare.

autonomy_mode.description: The ONLY legal value. 'Auto'/'AUTO'/blank/anything else is schema-invalid => park lane (never a silent interactive downgrade).

declared_by.description: The manager principal that declared this run AUTO at run setup.

attestation_sha256.description: SHA-256 (lowercase) of the standing .neo/AUTO_MODE_ATTESTATION.md content; the engine re-hashes the on-disk attestation and requires a case-exact match (re-signing the attestation invalidates stale records).
